code: import React,{useEffect}from"react";import{useNavigate}from"react-router-dom";import{authService}from"../services";const Dashboard=()=>{const user=authService.getCurrentUser();const navigate=useNavigate();useEffect(()=>{if((user===null||user===void 0?void 0:user.role)==="admin"){navigate("/admin/dashboard",{replace:true});}else{navigate("/user/dashboard",{replace:true});}},[user,navigate]);return null;};export default Dashboard;
